title: orobus lens
intro: Orobus lens, also known as the kidney vetch or orchil plant, is a perennial herb that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antiseptic, and exhibit diuretic and laxative effects. The health benefits of Orobus lens include its use in treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used topically or taken orally.
